headline: diagnostic no longer counts statusLine as a hook command

bullets: `setup-toolkit-diagnose.sh` Check 1 now extracts hook commands from `.hooks` only (via `jq`), not from the entire settings file. The old `sed` regex included the `statusLine` block's command, causing a false `EXTRA: .claude/scripts/statusline-capture.sh` when the synced template predated the statusLine addition. Re-sync to pick up the fix.
